_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Data modelling involves producing visual representations of information systems to communicate the relationship between different data types.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data modeling techniques including conceptual, logical, and physical modeling, entity-relationship modeling, dimensional modeling, and data vault methodology.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-002 (AB, cosine: 0.534), OP-K-005 (OP, cosine: 0.530).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.476). Shared vocabulary: [data, relationship]. DDaT-only terms [communicate, different, information, involves, modelling, producing] vs WIDAI-only terms [conceptual, dimensional, entity, knowledge, logical, methodology] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.876, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DDaT element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Data modelling involves producing visual representations of information systems" and "Knowledge of data modeling techniques including conceptual, logical, and physica" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.558 > STS 0.476 (gap +0.082). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, relationship] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [data, relationship]. DDaT-only: [communicate, different, information, involves, modelling, producing]. WIDAI-only: [conceptual, dimensional, entity, knowledge, logical, methodology].

signals.detail: STS 0.476 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
